creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Tue Sep 24 15:45:17 2013
New Revision: 328149
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/328149

Log:
  - Update to 1.4.1
  - Pass maintainership to ruby@
  
  PR:		ports/181571
  Submitted by:	"Mikhail T." <m.tsatsenko@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/databases/rubygem-memcache/Makefile
  head/databases/rubygem-memcache/distinfo

Modified: head/databases/rubygem-memcache/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/rubygem-memcache/Makefile	Tue Sep 24 15:27:08 2013	(r328148)
+++ head/databases/rubygem-memcache/Makefile	Tue Sep 24 15:45:17 2013	(r328149)
@@ -2,11 +2,11 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	memcache
-PORTVERSION=	1.3.0
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.1
 CATEGORIES=	databases rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
-MAINTAINER=	m.tsatsenko@gmail.com
+MAINTAINER=	ruby@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Ruby bindings for libmemcached
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	memcached:${PORTSDIR}/databases/libmemcached

Modified: head/databases/rubygem-memcache/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/rubygem-memcache/distinfo	Tue Sep 24 15:27:08 2013	(r328148)
+++ head/databases/rubygem-memcache/distinfo	Tue Sep 24 15:45:17 2013	(r328149)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rubygem/memcache-1.3.0.gem) = fad3a038c10265b507018c95c2ff00a05f607e3c4ea5a29c79972600df03f88c
-SIZE (rubygem/memcache-1.3.0.gem) = 1613312
+SHA256 (rubygem/memcache-1.4.1.gem) = d0a648e7ea1edff10265e885418955aa52f69464d1f95b11b1f30b1611c93ece
+SIZE (rubygem/memcache-1.4.1.gem) = 1614336
